ops.text: ccx vcs ship picked the stale local bookmark cc-transcript-v8 (pointing at an old TEMPORARY commit) over main, committed 74c6a998 there, reported 'pushed cc-transcript-v8 → origin · CI no-run', and exited 0 — the push never landed on origin and no CI ran, all while looking like success. Second occurrence of this trap (see grep-stale-zero-recheck). Ship should prefer main (or the @-tracking bookmark), or at minimum refuse/warn when the bookmark it is about to move is not main and sits behind it.
